description: Record and validation of a deposition regarding a compound partly dedicated to the synagogues. The document bears two dates, 4 Iyyar [1]358 Sel. and 2 Kislev (1359 Seleucid); apparently the validation took place seven months after the deposition was first recorded. A deposition given by four witnesses, prominent persons, confirms the fact that one sixth of a compound has been dedicated to the two synagogues of the Rabbanite Jews in Fustat, those of the Palestinians and of the Babylonians. The validation of the document and the authentication of the signatures take place before the two courts of the two congregations. The two heads of the courts, Sahlan b. Abraham and Efrayim b. Shemarya, sign the validation. (Infromation from Gil, Documents, pp. 151 #7)
description_he: רשומה ואישור עדות על חצר המוקדשת חלקה לבתי הכנסת. ארבעה עדים מאשרים הקדשת שישית חצר לשתי בתי הכנסת בפוסטאט, סהלאן בן אברהם ואפרים בן שמריה חתמו.
